svg.aria-label: Step responses comparing a PI controller that overshoots and rings versus a PID controller that the derivative term damps to a clean settle, with an inset showing a smooth proportional command but a jagged derivative command under measurement noise
svg.title: Step responses comparing a PI controller that overshoots and rings versus a PID controller that the derivative term damps to a clean settle, with an inset showing a smooth proportional command but a jagged derivative command under measurement noise
svg.text: Derivative control damps overshoot (PI vs PID)
